events.title: A.J. Croce Presents CROCE PLAYS CROCE
events.description: Acclaimed singer songwriter, piano virtuoso & multi-instrumentalist returns. Through stories, humor, & remarkable musicianship, A.J. connects audiences to both his father's iconic body of work & his own evolution as one of today's most respected artists.

events.title: Chris Isaak
events.description: Platinum-selling & GRAMMY-nominated singer/songwriter & actor. Part of our 100th Anniversary year - Featuring Big Acts in our Intimate, Historic Theatre! Oh, what a Wicked Game!

events.title: Dustbowl Revival
events.description: Dustbowl's ever-evolving collective plays a spicy cocktail of folky-funk & booty-shaking jangly rock n' soul: expertly mixing their New Orleans-tinted brass section with their signature Laurel Canyon harmonies & fearless lyrics.

events.title: Electric Avenue: The 80's MTV Experience
events.description: What if you could experience all of the youthful energy & sonic celebration that was 1980s New Wave & Radio Pop? Every sound. Every nuance. Every feeling. That's Electric Avenue.

events.title: Fred Tackett & Scott Sharrard (of Little Feat)
events.description: These talented musicians and songwriters are stepping out from the electric swamp boogie of Little Feat and hitting the road with a couple of acoustic guitars, along with some great songs and stories.

events.title: Frozen - The Live Musical
events.description: The Broadway Musical brings Disney's beloved story to the stage, following sisters Elsa and Anna as they discover the power of love and family amid a kingdom trapped in eternal winter.

events.title: Keller Williams & The Keels
events.description: Keller built his reputation initially on his engaging live performances, no two of which are ever alike. Joining him on stage is award winning flat picker Larry Keel and his rock solid, in the pocket bass playing wife, Jenny Keel.

events.title: Little Shop of Horrors
events.description: Deviously delicious Broadway & Hollywood sci-fi smash musical. A darkly comedic musical about Seymour, a timid flower shop clerk, who discovers a mysterious plant that brings fame & fortune - at a deadly cost.

events.title: Mason Jennings
events.description: Returning to the Egyptian stage with a brand new album, Underneath The Roses. Well known for his simple yet catchy melodies. Mason Jennings is an American folk-pop singer-songwriter with intimate lyrics, literary & historical themes, & distinctive voice.

events.title: Pure Prairie League
events.description: Returning to our stage - 1960s' rock band with a heavy dose of country and high-flying harmony. Featuring founding member/innovative pedal steel guitarist John David Call.

events.title: Russell Thompkins Jr. and The New Stylistics
events.description: Russell Thompkins, Jr. is best known as the original lead singer of the legendary R&B vocal group out of Philadelphia, The Stylistics. The Stylistics had 12 straight Top 10 Billboard R&B singles, & 5 gold singles from 1971 through 1974.

events.title: Shrek The Musical Jr.
events.description: Adaptation of the Broadway musical & DreamWorks film. This is a one-of-a-kind, hilarious fairy tale in which curses are reversed; monsters get the girls, donkeys & dragons find love, & princesses are beautiful in all shapes & sizes.

events.title: Sixpence None The Richer
events.description: Alternative rock band known for their distinctive blend of indie-rock & introspective songwriting. Best known for their hits "Kiss Me", "There She Goes", "Breathe Your Name", and "Don't Dream It's Over".

events.title: Something Rotten!
events.description: A hilarious musical comedy set in the Renaissance, where brothers Nick & Nigel Bottom struggle to compete with Shakespeare. Desperate for a hit, they set out to write the world's first musical, leading to outrageous mishaps & show-stopping numbers.

events.title: THE BABYS
events.description: Celebrating 50 Years! Led by original member and legendary drummer Tony Brock - the iconic sound of THE BABYS takes you on a nostalgic and scintillating journey of musical craftsmanship and rock & roll!

events.title: The Drifters
events.description: R&B/soul doo-wop legends form this Rock & Roll Hall of Fame band that has spanned almost six decades and boasts classic hits such as "Under the Boardwalk, "Stand by Me," "This Magic Moment," "Up On The Roof," and more.

events.title: The Grass Roots
events.description: The highly successful rock band from the 60's-70's era takes the stage with hits - "Midnight Confessions", "Let's Live For Today", "Two Divided by Love", & many more.

events.title: THE ORCHESTRA starring ELO former members
events.description: A successor band to Electric Light Orchestra, formed by former members of ELO and ELO Part II. A true rock supergroup, continuing as THE ORCHESTRA, carrying forward the music, legacy, and spirit of ELO for audiences around the world.

events.title: The Smithereens
events.description: '80s rock band known for their distinctive sound rooted in the melodic punch of the British Invasion, fused with the raw energy of American garage rock. With modern rock classics "Blood and Roses", "Behind the Wall of Sleep", "A Girl Like You", & more.

events.title: The SteelDrivers
events.description: Grammy Award Winning Bluegrass band from Nashville. The SteelDrivers bring a passion to their delivery that adds a distinctive flavor, & forceful grit adding undertones of blues, soul, & rock.

events.title: The Sweet
events.description: British rock band that rose to worldwide fame in the '70s as one of the top three "Glam Rock Acts" of its era. With 39 #1 singles including "Ballroom Blitz," "Fox On the Run", "Love Is Like Oxygen," "Blockbuster", "Teenage Rampage", & many more.

events.title: Thriller - Odyssey Dance Theatre
events.description: If Odyssey Dance Theatre's Thriller isn't part of your yearly Halloween tradition, it should be. The spooky spectacular combines technical aspects of dance while paying homage to the stars of All Hallows' Eve.
